rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
generic_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation annexes in valid implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation scope outputs or auxiliary variables
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic and implications
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested `if ... then ... else` for branching logic
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
